'''zhasapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:joanie|joanie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joanie|joanie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhasapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæsæpæth|zhæsæpæth]] || [[word:zhæsæpæj|zhæsæpæj]] || [[word:zhæsæpæsh|zhæsæpæsh]] || [[word:zhæsæpæ|zhæsæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhasasapath|zhasasapath]] || [[word:zhasasapaj|zhasasapaj]] || [[word:zhasasapash|zhasasapash]] || [[word:zhasasapa|zhasasapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhasapath|zhasapath]] || [[word:zhasapaj|zhasapaj]] || [[word:zhasapash|zhasapash]] || [[word:zhasapa|zhasapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhasafpath|zhasafpath]] || [[word:zhasafpaj|zhasafpaj]] || [[word:zhasafpash|zhasafpash]] || [[word:zhasafpaf|zhasafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhasapatha|zhasapatha]] || [[word:zhasapaja|zhasapaja]] || [[word:zhasapasha|zhasapasha]] || [[word:zhasapaka|zhasapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhasapath|zhasapath]] || [[word:zhasapaj|zhasapaj]] || [[word:zhasapash|zhasapash]] || [[word:zhasapa|zhasapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhasapathal|zhasapathal]] || [[word:zhasapajal|zhasapajal]] || [[word:zhasapashal|zhasapashal]] || [[word:zhasapakal|zhasapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhasapathatha|zhasapathatha]] || [[word:zhasapajaja|zhasapajaja]] || [[word:zhasapashasha|zhasapashasha]] || [[word:zhasapaka|zhasapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhasapathan|zhasapathan]] || [[word:zhasapajan|zhasapajan]] || [[word:zhasapashan|zhasapashan]] || [[word:zhasapakan|zhasapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhasapathaoro|zhasapathaoro]] || [[word:zhasapajaoro|zhasapajaoro]] || [[word:zhasapashaoro|zhasapashaoro]] || [[word:zhasapakaoro|zhasapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
